case.title: BOYCE v. PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA.

opinion.h1: BOYCE v. PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA., 340 U.S. 901 (1950)
opinion.h2: Ruth BOYCE, petitioner, v. PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA. No. 227, Misc.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Application denied.[ Boyce v. People of the State of California. 340 U.S. 901 (1950) ]
